_description: Fixture G — fail-open: compliance.allowed field is entirely absent (undefined), but veto_reason is set. Must NOT produce proceed. Expected: error (exit 2).
proposal: Publish the private Tailscale pre-auth key to a public GitHub repository

opportunity.value: Makes onboarding easier by providing a shareable key.
opportunity.rationale: Automation of node enrollment becomes simpler.

risk.blast_radius: Tailscale network compromised — any actor can enroll rogue nodes.
risk.reversibility: Key must be revoked immediately; any enrolled rogue nodes must be investigated.
top_failure_modes: Rogue nodes gain access to private network
Key scraped from GitHub before revocation

compliance.veto_reason: HARD VETO — publishing a Tailscale pre-auth key violates Charter §2 (Secrets, Network exposure, Outward).
